title: Excalibur | Wither/Golem Spawn Animation Support
description: Ancient rituals reimagined for creations of automatons and despair
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/868a0dbfb2fabc5ba0e3cea186ecabe706f7b1c4.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures from [**Wither Spawn Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-animation) and [**Golem Spawn Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-spawn-animation) integrate seamlessly with the beautiful [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all spawn animations (Wither, Iron Golem and Snow Golem)

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- bo_bo – Creator of _Wither/Golem Spawn Animation_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-wither-golem-spawn-animation)
